message:
perf(storage): Implement binary metadata serialization (Opt 3.1)

Add MessagePack serialization for metadata_json and extra_json columns,
providing 50-70% storage reduction and faster parsing.

- Add rmp-serde dependency for MessagePack support
- Add schema migration V7 with metadata_bin and extra_bin columns
- Implement serialize_json_to_msgpack and deserialize_msgpack_to_json
- Add read_metadata_compat for dual-read (binary first, JSON fallback)
- Update insert_conversation and insert_message to write binary
- Update list_conversations and fetch_messages to read binary first
- Add 8 unit tests for roundtrip, edge cases, and migration
- Update schema version test to use CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@ console = "*"
 colored = "*"
 serde = { version = "*", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "*"
+rmp-serde = "1"  # MessagePack for binary metadata serialization (Opt 3.1)
 toml = "*"
 directories = "*"
 which = "*"
@@ -36,6 +37,7 @@ crossbeam-channel = "*"
 parking_lot = "*"
 lru = "*"
 fxhash = "*"  # Fast non-cryptographic hashing for cache keys (P1 Opt 1.3)
+regex = "*"
 reqwest = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["json", "rustls-tls", "blocking"] }
 ratatui = { version = "*", features = ["crossterm"] }
 crossterm = "*"
